message:
🐛 Fix cards collapsing during initial data load (#548)

Cards now stay expanded showing skeleton until data loads, then
respect the saved collapsed state. This prevents the jarring
sequence of: skeleton → collapse → show data.

- Track hasCompletedInitialLoad state
- Only apply collapsed state after initial data is ready
- Skeleton or data always visible during load

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
